title: Which Christopher Nolan Protagonist Are You? (Yes, We Know Everyone's Obsessed With Him Right Now)
dek: With Nolan's IMAX cameras still smoking from 'The Odyssey,' it's time to find out which of his tortured, time-bending, morally messy heroes actually matches YOUR brain.

quiz.intro: No wrong answers here — just answer like you actually would, tattoos and tesseracts optional.

questions.question: Your best friend just betrayed you in a way you absolutely did not see coming. What's your first move?

answers.text: Write it down immediately before I can forget or rationalize it away.
Suit up. There's always a bigger picture I'm responsible for.
Go several layers deep into denial until I've convinced myself it's fine.
Put the mission first and grieve later — there isn't time right now.
A city that desperately needs someone to fix its problems.
Somewhere I can get lost in my own head for a while.
Anywhere with my kids, honestly, even if it costs me years.
A remote desert lab where I can focus on one impossible problem.

questions.question: How do you handle a task everyone says is impossible?

answers.text: I convince myself the rules of reality are more flexible than people think.
I trust that love and instinct will get me there when logic can't.
I do it anyway, even knowing I might not like what I create.
I sacrifice literally anything, repeatedly, until it's perfect.

questions.question: What's your biggest flaw, if you're honest?

answers.text: I put the world ahead of the people right in front of me.
I don't fully reckon with the consequences until it's way too late.
My rivalry with one person consumed literally everything else in my life.
I'll follow an order into oblivion without asking who's really giving it.

questions.question: Someone you love asks you to stay instead of chasing your bigger purpose. What do you say?

answers.text: I go, because someone has to, even if it isolates me from everyone.
I choose the trick over the relationship, every single time.
I can't fully explain why, but I have to see this through.
I keep flying past the point I should've turned back.

questions.question: Pick a motto to live by.

answers.text: "Are you watching closely?"
"Don't try to understand it. Feel it."
"I'm on him."
"Memory can change the shape of a room."

questions.question: How would your coworkers describe you?

answers.text: Efficient, secretive, never explains more than he has to.
The one you want flying cover when things get bad — no drama, just results.
Intensely focused, but genuinely unpredictable — you never know what he'll remember.
Disciplined to a fault, disappears mysteriously, always shows up when it matters.
It's counted down by a fuel gauge, literally ticking toward zero.
It resets on me every few minutes, so I've built a whole system around it.
I've spent years training in the shadows before ever taking action.
It bends completely once you're inside someone else's dream.

questions.question: What would your villain origin story be?

answers.text: Giving myself a purpose to live for, even if it means deceiving myself forever.
Losing everyone I loved and deciding no one else should suffer that way.
Refusing to accept a tragedy was real, and building a fantasy instead.
Choosing the mission over my own child, and never forgiving myself for it.

questions.question: Last one: what does 'winning' actually look like for you?

answers.text: The city surviving, even if nobody ever knows it was me.
Finally getting home to the people I imagined the whole time.
Seeing my daughter's face again, no matter how much time has passed.
Living long enough to see whether the world forgives what I built.

results.name: Leonard Shelby
results.subtitle: Memento (2000)
results.description: You're relentless, methodical, and maybe a little too confident in your own version of the truth. You build elaborate systems to survive chaos — even if, deep down, you're not totally sure you can trust them either.

results.name: Bruce Wayne / Batman
results.subtitle: The Dark Knight Trilogy (2005-2012)
results.description: You channel your pain into discipline instead of letting it consume you. You'll disappear for years to become exactly who the moment requires — and you'll never ask for credit when it works.

results.name: Dom Cobb
results.subtitle: Inception (2010)
results.description: You're brilliant, but you carry guilt like a second job. You'd rather build an entire fantasy than face a truth that's too painful — and honestly, you're never 100% sure which one you're standing in.

results.name: Cooper
results.subtitle: Interstellar (2014)
results.description: You're a rare mix of instinct and intellect — practical enough to fly the ship, sentimental enough to believe love might actually be a force of physics. You'll sacrifice years of your life for the people you love, and somehow still find your way back.

results.name: J. Robert Oppenheimer
results.subtitle: Oppenheimer (2023)
results.description: You're driven by an idea bigger than yourself, even when you suspect it might destroy you. You carry the weight of your own brilliance quietly, and you're never quite sure the world will forgive you for it.

results.name: Robert Angier
results.subtitle: The Prestige (2006)
results.description: You're a showman with an obsessive streak — once someone gets in your way, you'll go to genuinely insane lengths to come out on top. It's not really about winning anymore; it's about the look on their faces when you do.

results.name: The Protagonist
results.subtitle: Tenet (2020)
results.description: You're all business — efficient, secretive, and willing to work a problem forward and backward until it makes sense. You don't need to fully understand the plan to trust that you're the right person to execute it.

results.name: Farrier
results.subtitle: Dunkirk (2017)
results.description: You're a quiet professional who says almost nothing and does absolutely everything. You'll push past the point of no return if it means finishing the job, and you never need applause to know you did it right.

sources.title: The Odyssey Reactions Are Officially In On Christopher Nolan's 2026 Epic
I'm a match to Leonard Shelby from Memento
I'm a match to Cooper from Interstellar
I'm a match to Robert Angier from The Prestige
I'm a match to Alfred Borden from The Prestige
